zh.lifeSummary: 當Maria de Montgomery於大約1125年出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾布洛可時，她的父親Arnoulf de Montgomery60歲，母親Lafracoth O'Brien50歲。她與William FitzGerald結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1176年9月1日在英國英格蘭波克夏享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maria de Montgomery于大约1125年出生在英国威尔斯布洛可爾布洛可时，她的父亲Arnoulf de Montgomery60岁，母亲Lafracoth O'Brien50岁。她与William FitzGerald结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1176年9月1日在英国英格兰波克夏享年52岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏。

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Maria de Montgomery was born about 1125, in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Arnoulf de Montgomery, was 60 and her mother, Lafracoth O'Brien, was 50. She married William FitzGerald. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 1 September 1176, in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52, and was buried in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maria de Montgomery est née environ 1125, à Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Arnoulf de Montgomery, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Lafracoth O'Brien, avait 50 ans. Elle a épousé William FitzGerald. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 1 septembre 1176, à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maria de Montgomery um 1125 in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Arnoulf de Montgomery 60 und ihre Mutter Lafracoth O'Brien 50. Sie hat William FitzGerald geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 1. September 1176 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maria de Montgomery è nata il circa 1125 nel Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Arnoulf de Montgomery, aveva 60 anni e sua madre, Lafracoth O'Brien, aveva 50 anni. Lei sposato William FitzGerald. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 settembre 1176, nel Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Maria de Montgomeryが約1125年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロクで生まれた時，父Arnoulf de Montgomeryは60歳，母Lafracoth O'Brienは50歳であった。William FitzGeraldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1176年9月1日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアで52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maria de Montgomery(이)가 대략 1125년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Arnoulf de Montgomery(은)는 60세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lafracoth O'Brien(은)는 50세였다. 그녀는 William FitzGerald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1176년 9월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maria de Montgomery родилась около 1125 г. в местности пемброк, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Arnoulf de Montgomery было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Lafracoth O'Brien, 50. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William FitzGerald. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 1 сентября 1176 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maria de Montgomery nació aproximadamente 1125, en Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Arnoulf de Montgomery, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Lafracoth O'Brien, tenía 50 años. Murió el 1 de septiembre de 1176, en Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
